titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/88

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=381 status=live modified=2021-04-06 13:20:42.48686+00 | translation moa=382 status=live modified=2021-04-06 13:20:40.864506+00

div.p:
Robertus de londoniis Omnibus filiis eccleise tam clericis quam laicis salutem
Notum sit uobis me hac mea presenti carta comfirmasse cartam
patris mei qua dedit et comfirmauit deo et sancte Marie et monachis de
melros dimidiam carrucatam terre . sed et ego ipsi dimidie carrucate
appossui et adieci reliquum terre quod adiacet usque ad derestredt et
sicut uia descendit in oblico apud orientem usque intorrentem . Hec omnia concessi . et dedi pro salute anime mee . et pro anima thome patrui mei .
et pro animabus patris et matris mee et omnium parentum meorum . His
testibus . Willelmo filio odardi . et henrico filio iordani . Willelmo cle
rico . de chausi . Rogero clerico . qui hanc cartam scripsit . Ricardo de
cameis . et Macho preposito . et Osmundo famulo meo .

p.cl: Robert of London sends greeting to all sons of the Church, both clergy as well as laity.

Be it known to you that by this my present charter I have confirmed my father's charter by which he gave and confirmed to God and to St Mary at Melrose half a ploughgate of land. I have added and applied to that half ploughgate of land the rest of the land which lies contiguous as far as 'Derestredt' and as the road descends in a slanting direction on the east down to the stream. All these things I have granted and given for the salvation of my soul, and for the soul of Thomas my father's brother, and for the souls of my father and mother, and of all my ancestors.

With these witnesses: William son of Odard, and Henry son of Jordan; William the clerk, of Chausi; Roger the clerk, who wrote this charter; Richard de Cameis, and Machus the provost; and Osmund my servant.
